response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified "START AGAIN" via on-screen text and search. Simplified search: "START AGAIN" hololive English and Japanese lyrics. 2. response.global_summary: The video is a concert performance featuring members of hololive English. It consists of two songs: "START AGAIN," performed by a group of hololive English members, followed by "Seishoujo Ryouiki," a solo performance by one of the members.

scenes.description: Group performance of "START AGAIN" by hololive English members on a concert stage.
